Design Your Locker Room

✓ Room size entered
→
2 Add & arrange lockers
→
3 Review & send to us
Step 2

Add Lockers

Pick a locker model, choose your size, color, and any accessories. Set the quantity and click Add. They'll appear on the layout below where you can drag them into position.

100%

Layers

This panel lists every item in your room: walls, doors, windows, and lockers. Click any item to select it on the canvas, then you can edit its size, color, or position. As you add lockers they will appear here.

    Your layout will appear here
    Your room is loading from the previous step. If nothing appears, go back and re-enter your dimensions.
    3D Preview
    Drag background to orbit · Click locker to select · Drag locker to move · Double-click or press R to rotate
    Step 3

    Review Your Layout

    Here's everything you've configured across all your rooms. When you're happy with the layout, send it to your cart or email it to us and we'll help you bring it to life.

    We'll send a copy of your layout to your email and to our team so we can help you execute on your dream locker room.

    Custom wood locker rooms for collegiate and professional programs. Priced right. Built to last. 30+ years of craftsmanship.
